title: Disclosure Day Photos Give Best Look at Alien UFO in Steven Spielberg Movie
description: Newly released photos from Steven Spielberg’s Disclosure Day are giving audiences a closer look at the upcoming sci-fi film. As anticipation builds ahead of the film’s release, the latest images offer a better sense of the film’s tone and scale. The images, which hint at a large-scale UFO arrival scene, have sparked significant anticipation among [...] The post Disclosure Day Photos Give Best Look at Alien UFO in Steven Spielberg Movie appeared first on ComingSoon.net - Movie Trailers, TV & Streaming News, and More .

title: Area 51 hit with 17 earthquakes in a single day as Trump promises fresh UFO files release: ‘Worth discussing’
description: Area 51 experienced at least 17 earthquakes in a single day this week, with stumped experts admitting the behavior is highly “unusual.” The secretive Nevada Air Force base, long associated with reports of UFOs, was hit by comparatively shallow quakes, prompting conspiracy theories about nuclear testing. The cluster of earthquakes ranged in magnitude from 2.5 to 4.4 and struck near the base, which is about 80 miles from Las Vegas, according to US Geological Survey (USGS) data. The first, most powerful quake, struck 2.5 miles below ground just after 3 p.m. Wednesday local time, followed by more than a dozen...

title: Trump keeps us up in the air with his hints of what’s coming in a new batch of UFO files
description: President Donald Trump has directed the Pentagon to release some "very interesting" UFO files uncovered by his administration, generating a mix of buzz and skepticism as he hints at new revelations around questions of alien life.

title: Arc Raiders leak reveals new map, clan system & UFO enemy
description: An Arc Raiders leak appears to have revealed the next map coming to the shooter, as well as a new clan system and dangerous flying enemy.

title: Trump Accelerates UFO File Release Amid Claims Secret Program and Private Contractors Hid Non-Human Intelligence Since 1940s
description: A political storm in Washington arises as Trump's directive for UFO declassification meets resistance, amid claims of a decades-long cover-up of non-human intelligence since the 1940s.
